title: cyperus maritimus
intro: Cyperus maritimus, also known as the sea papyrus or salt sedge, is a species of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus maritimus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
